2013-T2-P6-S3.trunk: 条件+主句：If it is trying to upset Google …, it has chosen an indirect method（若它意在打击谷歌，那它选了一种迂回手段）
structure: 条件状语从句(If)：If it is trying to upset Google
└ 非限制性定语从句〔which，修饰 Google〕：which relies almost wholly on advertising
主句：it has chosen an indirect method
冒号后（说明）：There is no guarantee that DNT by default will become the norm
└ 同位语从句(that，说明 guarantee)：that DNT by default will become the norm
（后续独立句）：DNT does not seem an obviously huge selling point for Windows 8 — though the firm has compared … before
2013-T2-P6-S3.logic: If 条件从句（which 非限制定语从句修饰 Google）；主句 it has chosen an indirect method；冒号 + there is no guarantee that…（同位语从句）；末句 + though 让步。
notes: which 非限制性定语从句修饰 Google（几乎全靠广告）。
no guarantee that…：that 同位语从句说明 guarantee（无法保证…）。
本条含两句：句号后 DNT does not seem… 为另一句，though 引导让步；selling point 卖点；on that count 在那一点上。

2013-T2-P3-S1.trunk: S+V+O(动名词)：the FTC proposed adding a 「do not track」 option to internet browsers（联邦贸易委员会提议给浏览器加「禁止追踪」选项）
structure: 主句：America's Federal Trade Commission (FTC) proposed adding a 「do not track」 (DNT) option to internet browsers
└ 动名词作宾语：adding a … option to internet browsers
目的状语从句(so that)：so that users could tell advertisers that they did not want to be followed
└ 宾语从句(that)：that they did not want to be followed
2013-T2-P3-S1.logic: 主句 proposed adding…（动名词宾语）；so that 引导目的状语从句；tell advertisers that… 为双宾语 + that 宾语从句。
notes: propose doing：proposed adding…（动名词作宾语）。
so that 引导目的状语从句（以便）。
tell sb that…：tell advertisers + that 宾语从句；be followed 被追踪。

2013-T2-P2-S1.trunk: S+V+O：a quarrel has illustrated the value … of such fine-grained information（一场争论显示出这种细颗粒信息的价值）
structure: 状语：In the past couple of weeks
主句：a quarrel has illustrated the value to advertisers of such fine-grained information
└ 两个介词短语都修饰 value（中心词与修饰语分隔）：to advertisers + of such fine-grained information
冒号后（设问）：Should advertisers assume that people are happy to be tracked and sent behavioral ads?
└ 宾语从句(that)：that people are happy to be tracked and sent behavioral ads
2013-T2-P2-S1.logic: 主句 a quarrel illustrated the value（to advertisers 与 of … information 两个介词短语都修饰 value，造成中心词与修饰语分隔）；冒号引出一个反问；assume that… 宾语从句。
notes: the value to advertisers of such … information：to advertisers 与 of … information 两个介词短语都修饰 value（分隔）。
冒号后是设问句（引出讨论）。
be tracked and sent behavioral ads：被追踪并被推送行为广告（被动并列）。
